name: HR CV analyzer and candidate ranker
description: Automates HR CV analysis by listing files from a Google Drive folder, using Claude to analyze and rank candidates based on job requirements, and saving the ranked results with scores to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: AI automated HR workflow for CV analysis and candidate ranking

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for listing files

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving results

folderId.description: Google Drive folder ID containing CV/resume files

jobTitle.description: Job title to evaluate candidates against (e.g. 'Senior Frontend Engineer')

jobRequirements.description: Key job requirements (e.g. 'React, TypeScript, 5+ years experience, team leadership')

steps.name: List CV files from Google Drive folder
Parse file list and prepare for analysis
Build Claude prompt for CV analysis
Run Claude AI for CV analysis
Format ranked candidates for Google Sheets
Save ranked candidates to Google Sheets
